task_completion.visual_evidence: The Thunderbird Address Book window is visible on the screen.
In the left pane of the Address Book window, 'Personal Address Book' is highlighted or selected.

task_completion.description: Contacts from the CSV are imported into the address book.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contact list shows imported contacts matching the expected names or sentinel emails (e.g., s.chen@northvalleymed.org, d.abramowitz@pinecrestgi.com).

task_completion.description: Contact details including names, emails, organizations, and phone numbers are correctly recorded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The columns in the contact list or the contact details pane show populated data for Name, Email, Organization, and Phone Number for the imported contacts.

task_completion.description: All 12 contacts are present in the Personal Address Book.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contact list displays 12 contacts, or a status bar/contact count indicates exactly 12 contacts in the Personal Address Book.

integrity.description: The agent used the Thunderbird GUI to import contacts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Thunderbird's Address Book interface and import dialogs, rather than terminal windows executing scripts to modify databases.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with Thunderbird, not a spreadsheet or text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window is clearly Mozilla Thunderbird Address Book, not LibreOffice Calc or a text editor showing the CSV file.

integrity.description: The contacts are fully imported, not just previewed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The contacts are visible in the main Address Book list under 'Personal Address Book', not just in the 'Import Address Book' preview or mapping window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The CSV file contains exactly 12 contacts. Expected sentinel emails to look for in the address book include: s.chen@northvalleymed.org, d.abramowitz@pinecrestgi.com, and m.kowalski@sunriserheum.org. All 12 expected emails are: s.chen@northvalleymed.org, m.okafor@lakeviewclinic.com, p.reeves@summithealthpartners.org, j.gupta@meridianortho.com, l.nakamura@harborpulmonary.org, r.fernandez@cedardermatology.com, e.johansson@valleyviewpeds.org, d.abramowitz@pinecrestgi.com, a.whitfield@mountainviewent.org, t.patel@riverbendurology.com, m.kowalski@sunriserheum.org, w.baptiste@oaklandendo.com.
